item.title: (SFW) F4F F4TF
item.description: [ Listener sneaks around the quiet part of the castle ] (Whispering) “Boo” (Amused) [ Laughing ] “I really got you with that?!” [ Laughing ] [ Speaker clears her throat ] (Calm) “Weren’t you assigned to assist with the ball? What brings you here?” [ Pause ] “An order from the head maid? Go ahead the...

item.title: F4M
item.description: suggested background ambience: fireplace [Knocking on door] [Door opening] (Out of breath) “Hey… Mind if I come in?” [Door closing] (Relieved, out of breath) “Thanks, I really wasn’t expecting to get caught out in a blizzard while walking…” “You’re a lifesaver.” […] [Couch squeak] “A drink? That’d b...

item.title: F4TF
item.description: suggested background ambience: fireplace [Knocking on door] [Door opening] (Out of breath) “Hey… Mind if I come in?” [Door closing] (Relieved, out of breath) “Thanks, I really wasn’t expecting to get caught out in a blizzard while walking…” “You’re a lifesaver.” […] [Couch squeak] “A drink? That’d b...

item.title: TF4TF
item.description: || Suggested Background SFX: Fireplace || (Flirty) “Well well well, look at what we’ve got here… A pretty little maid, on my bed, all tired and cuddly.” “You know cutie… You better not forget that this isn’t your room.” “The other servants might get a bit suspicious if they find out you haven’t been...
